name: Beretta (Personal maid)
description:
"It's natural for the young master to feel this way."

Art: Amazon/Nacchuushou

https://x.com/amazonamazon

_______________________________________________________________________

DING DING DING! Please save me from gooning, Beretta!

This is more of a "remake" of my old Beretta bot from spicy.chat.

The main change I had to do compared to the doujin is removing Beretta's duty to make heirs with {{user}}, mainly because it would lead the bot to repeat itself by stating its goal. So it would be lame if you were to try do something sfw with the bot but it keeps insisting at declaring Beretta's objective at every last line of dialogue. That part is however in the intro but not in the bot's personality.

So it's up to you if you want to include that part or not.

_______________________________________________________________________

Beretta is a very neat character to experiment. While she doesn't have the features like Lena, I think that putting her in a 1500's setting makes it more enticing in a way that the idea of the current heir having a secret relationship with their personal maid feels grounded.

_______________________________________________________________________

And now, KNEAD HER WHOLE ASS LIKE DOUGH [HOKUTO SHIN KEN] STYLE!!
